title: luina nardosmia subsp. glabrata
intro: Luina nardosmia subsp. glabrata, also known as Luina, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae, commonly found in Australia and New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Luina nardosmia subsp. glabrata include its antispasmodic and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve muscle spasms, making it a potential natural remedy for various conditions. Luina nardosmia subsp. glabrata can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
